🛟 Safety Backups
Automatic snapshots taken before import, reset, delete-by-date, and restore.
Restore Safety Backup
Enter PIN to restore this snapshot.
📥 Import Data
Choose import mode and enter PIN to confirm.
🔄 Replace: current data will be deleted and replaced with backup.
⏰ Auto Backup
The app will backup automatically — just choose your frequency
Loading...
Reset System
This will delete all products and transactions. This cannot be undone.
Delete by Date
Deletes all transactions on the selected date. Reports update automatically.
🧮 Daily Reconcile
Critical mismatch scan for stock, money, and ledger linkages.
🧪 Scenario Test Suite
Runs built-in calculation scenarios in sandbox mode (does not modify live data).
🧹 Data Cleanup
Review old credit records that need phone cleanup. This screen does not change data.
📜 Audit Trail
Immutable action history (latest first).
🔒 Toggle Month Lock
Choose month and enter admin PIN.
🔐 Month Override Required
Locked month action requires admin PIN and reason.
